# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

services:
  - name: users-service
    url: http://users-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        paths:
          - /users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 5
          hour: 10000

  - name: orders-service
    url: http://orders-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
    plugins:
      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          max_bytes: 1048576

  - name: products-service
    url: http://products-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: products-route
        paths:
          - /products
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - '*'
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    targets:
      - target: users-service:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    targets:
      - target: orders-service:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: products-upstream
    targets:
      - target: products-service:8080
        weight: 100

load_balancing:
  - name: round-robin
    services:
      - users-service
      - orders-service
      - products-service
